subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down with manifest verses, and the divine commandments and ordinances stand revealed before all created things throughout all times by the Pen of the Most Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نازل آیات مشهود اوامر و احکام الهی امام وجوه موجود در جمیع احیان قلم رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @power of the Manifestation of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
